assignment.title: Introduction to Crime Scenes Assignment
assignment.instructor_text:
The goal of a crime scene investigation is to recognize, document, and collect evidence at the scene of the crime. Solving the crime will then depend on all of these pieces coming together to solve the crime.

Complete the following assignment about crime scene procedures.  Click on the image below to make a copy of the Introduction to Crime Scenes Assignment.  Double click on the top of the document to open the header and add your name to the document.

When you have completed the assignment, upload it below and select Submit to complete your submission.

Revisit the Course Information section if you need a refresher on how to submit your assignments.
